task:
Configure the following persistent LibreOffice preferences so that the changes are flushed to `~/.config/libreoffice/4/user/registrymodifications.xcu`:

1. Load/Save — General: set the default 'Always save as' format for Presentation to 'PowerPoint 2007-365 (.pptx)', enable 'Always create backup copy', enable AutoRecovery, and set the AutoRecovery interval to 5 minutes.
2. LibreOffice Impress — General: set the measurement unit to 'Inch'.

LibreOffice must be closed cleanly after the changes so the registry file is written; the verifier cannot read the preferences until LibreOffice has exited.

verification.description: AutoSave interval property has been written to the LibreOffice registry
AutoSave interval is set to 5 minutes
Default save filter for Impress has been set
Default save filter for Impress is PowerPoint 2007-365 (.pptx)
Impress measurement unit set to Inch (enum value 8)
